titleStmt.title: SII 22.4: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 4. (A.R. No. 4 of 1906) CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT, KANCHIPURAM TALUK, KĀÑCHĪPURAM. ĒKĀMRANĀTHA TEMPLE-ON THE WALL OF THE BIG GŌPURA. VĪRA MALLIKĀRJUNADĒVA-MAHĀRĀYA-Śaka 1378.

summary.p: The details of the date are given as Śaka 1378, Dhātu, Tulā, śu. 5, Friday, Hastā which would correspond to A.D. 1456, October 4. But the week-day and nakshatra do not tally with the tithi.

The inscription is left unfinished. It mentions a tax (?) called Iḍaṅgai-vari and some land endowed to the temple of Tiruvēgambam-uḍaiya-Nāyanār in Kāñchīpuram, a nagara in Eyiṟ-kōṭṭam, a division of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti [*] śrīman mahāmaṇḍaliśvara śrīviramallikārjjunadeva mahārāyar pṛthivirājyam paṇṇiaruḷāniṉṟa śakābdam 1000 3 100 7 10 8- mel cellāniṉṟa dhātusamvatsarattu tulānāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu pañcamiyum śukravāramum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ jayaṅkoṇ
ṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu Eyiṟkoṭṭattu nakaraṅ kāñcipurattu Uṭaiyār tiruve kampamuṭaiya nāyiṉār tiruppaṇikkuc cellukiṟa putuppākkattukkum kāmākṣidevi yār devatānam veḷiyūṟkum Iṭaṅkai varikkuc ceStops here.
Digital edition of SII 22.4 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
